contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 10
- Description: agentic_ai_context: reflect wholesale rollout (price list, proposal, SKU checklist)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/58
  
  Details:
  Reflected the wholesale-page rollout in the agentic_ai_context workspace docs so future AI sessions read consistent state.
  
  What changed:
  - AGROVERSE_PRICE_LIST_AND_ASSETS.md: documented both retail-pack paths (consignment opening 5 bags / wholesale-bought opening 10 bags), same $17/bag and $25–$35 retail. Added https://agroverse.shop/wholesale as the canonical published page and "visual companion to the PDF."
  - RETAILER_FUNNEL_PROPOSAL.md: status flipped from "Draft for review" to "Implemented 2026-04-27." Encoded Gary's seven §6 decisions inline at the top (container Option C, retailer-primary audience, open pricing, mailto-only sample pack, USA stockists, community@ CTA, MOQ split). Added §9 Implementation table mapping each layer to its PR. Listed explicitly-deferred follow-ups (sample-pack SKU, footer sweep, /gifts/ page, founderhaus).
  - AGROVERSE_SHOP_NEW_SKU_WEB_CHECKLIST.md: new checklist step covering the "Selling Agroverse in your shop?" wholesale banner that every PDP now carries; placement differs slightly between per-bag and per-kg SKUs.
  
  Why:
  - Stale workspace docs would mislead the next AI agent into rebuilding what already shipped or quoting the wrong MOQ.
  - The proposal's "Open questions" section is no longer open; leaving it as draft conflicts with the live page.
  
  Files intentionally NOT touched (Gary has WIP in stash on these): README.md, PROJECT_INDEX.md, PARTNER_OUTREACH_PROTOCOL.md, CONTEXT_UPDATES.md, ADVISORY_SNAPSHOT.md, GMAIL_OAUTH_WORKFLOW.md, GOOGLE_API_CREDENTIALS.md, NOTES_dapp.md.
  
  Pull requests:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/58
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 16.67
